overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk video game showing a dusk walk through a futuristic urban park. The player moves from a tree-lined promenade past an informal wooded encampment, then through a neon-lit plaza beneath massive concrete overpasses with scattered pedestrians and vendor stalls.

segments.scene_description: Turning left into a wooded area with dirt ground, large tree trunks, and scattered trash bags. The concrete overpass becomes visible in the distance while the industrial building moves to the right.

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the woods into a wide plaza beneath massive concrete overpasses. Commercial buildings with bright billboards line the left side while pedestrians walk through the area. A food vendor cart with a colorful umbrella appears on the right.

agents.ego_description: continuing through plaza under overpass, passing fountain area and dense vegetation

thick bushes and trees planted under the overpass

segments.scene_description: Walking deeper under the overpass where the space becomes more enclosed. A fountain structure appears on the left while dense vegetation lines the right. The concrete overpass structure dominates the left side as the commercial buildings fade from view.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a structured urban promenade into a gritty wooded area and finally beneath the oppressive scale of massive concrete overpasses. It begins along a paved path lined with trees and vertical neon lights, moving toward a distant industrial complex and an elevated yellow bridge. As the camera turns left, the paved ground shifts to dirt and the scenery transitions into a wooded encampment filled with large tree trunks and scattered trash bags. The scene then opens into a wide plaza where bright commercial billboards and a colorful food vendor cart appear beneath the looming shadow of the overpasses. Finally, the camera pushes deeper into the enclosed space under the concrete structures, passing a fountain on the left and dense vegetation on the right as the open city skyline fades from view.
